title: Study Skills and Time Management
description: Techniques for effective studying, creating reading schedules, and managing academic time.

title: Listening Comprehension
description: Active listening strategies, identifying main ideas in lectures, and the Cornell note-taking system.

title: Reading Strategies
description: How to read faster, skim for general ideas, scan for specific facts, and the SQ3R reading method.

title: Basic Grammar: Parts of Speech
description: Deep dive into nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, pronouns, prepositions, conjunctions, and interjections.

title: Sentence Construction and Types
description: Understanding simple, compound, complex, and compound-complex sentences, and identifying clauses.

title: Vocabulary Development
description: Using context clues, prefixes, suffixes, root words, synonyms, and antonyms to build academic vocabulary.

title: Common Errors in English
description: Identifying and correcting subject-verb agreement issues, misplaced modifiers, and tense inconsistencies.
